text_en: Advantage on attacks vs creatures you grapple; can try to pin a grappled creature.
Add proficiency bonus to initiative; swap initiative with a willing ally.
Learn two cleric cantrips and one 1st-level cleric spell.
Once per turn, reroll the damage of a weapon attack and use either total.
Gain proficiency in any three skills or tools.
Your hit point maximum increases by twice your level.
